word: H2193 - זָעַךְ - zâʻak - zaw-ak' - Be extinct

sections.paragraph:
Original: זעך

Transliteration: zâ‛ak

Phonetic: zaw-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to extinguish, be extinct, be extinguished
    1. (Niphal) to be extinguished

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 567

Part(s) of speech: Verb
